side_effects.description: Skin breakouts/purging ('copper uglies') occurring on current GHK-cu cycle; did not experience this on a previous GHK-cu cycle before switching to Glow

protocol_notes: OP previously used GHK-cu without breakouts, then switched to a product called 'Glow', and is now back on GHK-cu and experiencing breakouts. Asking how long the purging phase lasts.
